briefdescription.para: Get the internal KisAngleSelector as a QWidget, so it may be added to a UI.

simplesect.para: the internal KisAngleSelector as a QWidget

briefdescription.para: Sets the current angle.
Sets the current angle to the reset angle.
Gets the current angle.
Gets the angle to which multiples the selected angle will snap.

detaileddescription.para:
The default snap angle is 15 degrees so the selected angle will snap to its multiples (0, 15, 30, 45, etc.)
The angle to which multiples the selected angle will snap
setSnapAngle(qreal)

briefdescription.para: Gets the angle that is used to reset the current angle.

detaileddescription.para:
This angle is used when the user double clicks on the widget
The angle that is used to reset the current angle
setResetAngle(qreal)

briefdescription.para: Gets the number of decimals (precision) used by the angle.

detaileddescription.para:
If you want to simulate integer angles, set it to 0. The default is 2.
The number of decimals being used
setDecimals(int)

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum value for the angle.

detaileddescription.para:
The default is 360
The maximum value for the angle
setMaximum(qreal)
setRange(qreal, qreal)

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum value for the angle.

detaileddescription.para:
The default is 0
The minimum value for the angle
setMinimum(qreal)
setRange(qreal, qreal)

briefdescription.para: Gets the prefix shown in the spin box.

simplesect.para: The prefix shown in the spin box

briefdescription.para: Gets if the angle should wrap pass the minimum or maximum angles.

simplesect.para: True if the angle should wrap pass the minimum or maximum angles, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Gets the mode in which the flip options should be shown.

detaileddescription.para:
The default is Buttons
The mode in which the flip options should be shown.
setFlipOptionsMode(QString)

briefdescription.para: Gets the common height of the widgets inside this angle selector.

simplesect.para: The height of the internal widgets (angle gauge, spin box, etc.). Returns 0 if each widget has its default height.

briefdescription.para: Gets the direction in which the angle increases in the angle gauge.

simplesect.para: The direction in which the angle increases

briefdescription.para: Gets if the spin box is flat (no border or background)

simplesect.para: True if the spin box is flat, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the angle to which multiples the selected angle will snap.

parameterdescription.para: the new angle to which multiples the selected angle will snap

briefdescription.para: Sets the angle that is used to reset the current angle.

parameterdescription.para: the new angle that is used to reset the current angle

briefdescription.para: Sets the number of decimals (precision) used by the angle.

parameterdescription.para: the new number of decimals used by the angle

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum value for the angle.

parameterdescription.para: the new maximum value for the angle

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum value for the angle.

parameterdescription.para: the new minimum value for the angle

briefdescription.para: Sets the minimum and maximum values for the angle.

parameterdescription.para: the new minimum value for the angle
the new maximum value for the angle

briefdescription.para: Sets the prefix shown in the spin box.

parameterdescription.para: the new prefix for the spin box

briefdescription.para: Sets if the angle should wrap pass the minimum or maximum angles.

parameterdescription.para: true if the angle should wrap pass the minimum or maximum angles, false otherwise

briefdescription.para: Sets the mode in which the flip options should be shown.

parameterdescription.para:
the new mode in which the flip options should be shown Valid arguments:
NoFlipOptions - There are no flip options available
MenuButton - The flip options are shown as a menu accessible via a options button
Buttons - The flip options are shown as individual buttons
ContextMenu - The flip options are shown only as a context menu when right-clicking the gauge widget
flipOptionsMode() const

briefdescription.para: Sets the common height of the widgets inside this angle selector. Use 0 to reset widgets to default height.

parameterdescription.para: the new height of the internal widgets (angle gauge, spin box, etc.)

briefdescription.para: Sets the increasing direction in the angle gauge.

parameterdescription.para: The new increasing direction Valid arguments: CounterClockwise or Clockwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets if the spin box should be flat.

parameterdescription.para: True if the spin box should be flat, false otherwise

memberdef.argsstring: (qreal angle, qreal minimum, qreal maximum, bool *ok=nullptr)
memberdef.name: closestCoterminalAngleInRange

briefdescription.para: Gets the closest coterminal angle to the provided angle that is in the range provided.

detaileddescription.para:
A coterminal angle to the provided angle is one that differs in size by an integer multiple of a turn (360 degrees)
angle
The reference angle for which the function will try to find a coterminal angle
minimum
The range's lower bound
maximum
The range's upper bound
ok
This parameter will be set to true if a coterminal angle exists in the provided range, or to false otherwise
The closest coterminal angle in the provided range if one exists, or the closest value in the range (the minimum or maximum) otherwise. If the reference angle is already in the range then it is returned

briefdescription.para: Gets the closest coterminal angle to the provided angle that is in the range established.

detaileddescription.para:
A coterminal angle to the provided angle is one that differs in size by an integer multiple of a turn (360 degrees)
angle
The reference angle for which the function will try to find a coterminal angle
ok
This parameter will be set to true if a coterminal angle exists in the specified range, or to false otherwise
The closest coterminal angle in the specified range if one exists, or the closest value in the range (the minimum or maximum) otherwise. If the reference angle is already in the range then it is returned

briefdescription.para: Flips an angle horizontally, vertically, or both.

detaileddescription.para:
This function will always try to get the closest angle to the provided one that satisfies the flipping requirements
angle
The angle to be flipped
orientations
Flags indicating in which directions the angle should be flipped
The flipped angle

memberdef.argsstring: (qreal angle, qreal minimum, qreal maximum, Qt::Orientations orientations, bool *ok=nullptr)
memberdef.name: flipAngle

briefdescription.para: Flips an angle horizontally, vertically, or both.

detaileddescription.para:
This function will always try to get the closest angle to the provided one that satisfies the flipping requirements
angle
The angle to be flipped
minimum
The lower bound of the valid range
maximum
The upper bound of the valid range
orientations
Flags indicating in which directions the angle should be flipped
ok
This parameter will be set to true if the flipped angle is in the provided range, or to false otherwise
The flipped angle if it lies in the provided range or the closest value in the range (the minimum or maximum) otherwise

briefdescription.para: Flips the angle horizontally, vertically, or both.

detaileddescription.para:
This function will always try to set the closest angle to the stablished one that satisfies the flipping requirements
orientations
Flags indicating in which directions the angle should be flipped

briefdescription.para: A wrapper around KisAngleSelector, a widget with several options to select an angle. The widget itself is accessed with the widget() function.

detaileddescription.para: This widget is a combination of a KisAngleGauge and a spin box, along with some flipping options
